summary: Frontend translation framework verification (EN/NL/DE) on /threats/16584b99-8cc5-42a1-a5ec-0298db5436b8 + backend smoke + /equipment-manager hierarchy. P0 ThreatDetailPage translations: PASS for both NL and DE — title, failure_mode (Slibopbouw / Schlammansammlung), Faalmodus/Fehlermodus label, RPN sub-label, Bewerken/Bearbeiten, status pill, Risicoscore/Risikobewertung header, risk-level popup (Kritiek/Hoog/Middel/Laag), Waarschijnlijke oorzaak section, Delete dialog (Observatie verwijderen / Beobachtung löschen with full Dutch+German confirmation messages and Annuleren-Verwijderen / Abbrechen-Löschen buttons), Share dialog (Observatie delen with Dutch body + Kopiëren), Aangemaakt before date, sidebar tree (Lijn-90 / Linie-90, Nutvoorzieningen / Versorgungsunternehmen, Laboratorium, Hulpmiddel / Hilfs-). Switching back to EN renders cleanly with no undefined/missing-key markers. Backend smoke: failure_mode batch returns 523 entries (Filter blocked→Filter geblokkeerd ✓, Sludge Build up→Slibopbouw ✓); equipment_node batch returns 239 entries with 3 having descriptions including 961366ba Extruder→'Geïmporteerd uit ongestructureerde lijst (bron: plakken)'. P1 EquipmentDetailsDialog description translation: NOT verified end-to-end on UI — Extruder node id 961366ba is at Section/System depth and was not exposed in the search results (only deeper Extruder Barrel/Devulcanisation Extruder shown) and a persistent IntroOverlay (STEP 1 OF 9) plus AssetIQ 3.7.1 toast blocked further drilling.

ui_bugs.issue: Hierarchy node names render in English even when NL/DE active (e.g. '1-Line-90', '1U-20 EXU - Extrusion Unit', '1R-2003-Devulcanisation Extruder', 'Extruder Barrel 1'). The sibling sidebar EquipmentHierarchy on /threats DOES translate (shows Lijn-90, Versorgungsunternehmen etc.) so the new useEquipmentNodeIdMap wiring landed only on the sidebar TreeNode, not the full /equipment-manager page tree.
Tier badges Plant/Unit, Section/System, Equipment Unit, Subunit, Maintainable Item, Installation render in English on /equipment-manager regardless of language.
'Hierarchy', 'Tree', 'Levels' segmented buttons + '234 items' + 'Manage' footer link stay in English in NL and DE.

ui_bugs.component: ThreatDetailPage – Related Activity & Recommended Actions panels
ui_bugs.issue: Section titles 'Related Activity (4)', 'All', 'Recommended Actions', 'Add', '1 Reduce under pressure / Act' remain English in NL & DE. (Observation text itself is LLM output, but the static labels should translate.)
Share-observation dialog still shows English 'Close' button in NL mode (header & body otherwise correctly translated).
Tabs '7d / 14d / 30d' stay English; surrounding heading 'Risicovoorspelling / Risikovorhersage' is translated.

Console emits React error every render: 'Function components cannot be given refs. … Check the render method of Primitive.button.SlotClone'. Originates from DropdownMenuTrigger asChild + custom Button lacking React.forwardRef. Same warning was reported in iteration_34; still unaddressed.

Status combobox button is positioned in a sticky header that is off-viewport / not visible to Playwright (scroll-into-view fails). Could not enumerate dropdown items, so the requested verification of translated status values in the dropdown (Open / In behandeling / Geparkeerd / Beperkt / Gesloten / Geannuleerd) was NOT completed via UI. Display value 'Open'/'Offen' renders correctly when collapsed.

integration_issues.issue: Could not open the specific Extruder node (id 961366ba-09dd-4b0b-9fda-3e0ce4ab4e1c) in the /equipment-manager UI to confirm the Dutch description renders. Search for 'Extruder' only surfaces deeper descendants (Devulcanisation Extruder, Extruder Barrel 1-12, Extruder Shaft L/R). Backend GET /api/translations/batch/equipment_node?language_code=nl confirms the translation is available ({'961366ba…': {'name':'Extruder','description':'Geïmporteerd uit ongestructureerde lijst (bron: plakken)'}}), so this is a UI-reachability check only.

STEP 1 OF 9 onboarding overlay and an info toast announcing AssetIQ 3.7.1 mount over the page on every fresh session, intercepting clicks. has_seen_intro is true in user payload but the overlay still appears. Reproduced from iteration_34.

action_items: P1: Wire the same useEquipmentNodeIdMap translation map into the /equipment-manager page's full tree (not just the sidebar EquipmentHierarchy TreeNode). Currently sidebar shows Lijn-90 / Linie-90 while /equipment-manager shows Line-90 — they should be consistent.

Translate static UI chrome that stays English under NL/DE: 'Hierarchy'/'Tree'/'Levels' segmented control, '234 items'/'Manage', 'Related Activity'/'All'/'Recommended Actions'/'Add'/'Act' labels on ThreatDetailPage, 'Close' button in Share dialog, '7d/14d/30d' tab labels, hierarchy tier badges (Plant/Unit, Section/System, Equipment Unit, Subunit, Maintainable Item, Installation).
Fix the persistent React forwardRef console error on LanguageSwitcher's Button (wrap custom Button in React.forwardRef so DropdownMenuTrigger asChild stops warning).

Add data-testid to the status select combobox + items on ThreatDetailPage so the translated enum dropdown (Open / In behandeling / Geparkeerd / Beperkt / Gesloten / Geannuleerd) can be verified by tests; current sticky-header positioning makes the combobox not visible to playwright clicks.

Investigate why IntroOverlay re-appears for users with has_seen_intro=true (jedijk@gmail.com user object shows has_seen_intro:false on /equipment-manager but true on /threats — verify the flag is fetched/persisted consistently).
critical_code_review_comments: Inconsistency between sidebar EquipmentHierarchy (translates node names) and main /equipment-manager page tree (doesn't translate) suggests the translation hook was only inserted in one TreeNode component. Recommend extracting a shared TranslatedNodeLabel component used by both.

Several static UI strings (Recommended Actions, Add, Act, All, 7d/14d/30d, hierarchy tier labels) are hard-coded as JSX text rather than going through t() — visible by the fact they survive language switch.
Share dialog Close button text not localized — check whether it's the shadcn default close vs explicit button.
React forwardRef warning has persisted through 2 iterations (iteration_34, iteration_35). Recommend addressing now before adding more language-switcher work.

success_rate.backend: 100% (smoke for 2 batch endpoints + iteration_33 regression of 10 tests still passing)
success_rate.frontend: 85% — all ThreatDetailPage P0 criteria (a)–(j) verified in NL plus DE/EN regression; P1 EquipmentDetailsDialog description NOT verified end-to-end and several static-string translation gaps remain

context_for_next_testing_agent: Threat 16584b99-8cc5-42a1-a5ec-0298db5436b8 is the canonical NL test target (asset=Condensatievat, failure_mode=Slibopbouw). For Extruder description test: backend confirms id 961366ba returns Dutch description; UI reachability is the bottleneck — try collapsing all levels first, then drilling Tyromer→NLA→Line-90→EXU-Extrusion Unit and look for the Extruder section that is sibling-level (not the deeper Extruder Barrel children). Dismiss IntroOverlay via the X button (selector [data-testid='intro-overlay'] then click button[aria-label='Close']) BEFORE any clicks, never via DOM.remove() (caused React reconciler removeChild crash in this run). LanguageSwitcher trigger has no data-testid; iteration_34 already filed that. Status select on ThreatDetailPage is in a sticky header that needs scroll-up to be clickable.
rca of the issue: P1 hierarchy node-name translation: useEquipmentNodeIdMap is correctly populated (backend 239 entries, frontend hook returns map) and wired into the sidebar's EquipmentHierarchy.TreeNode (line ~192) which renders correctly. However the /equipment-manager page renders its own tree component that has NOT been wired — the rows show raw `node.name` instead of `nodeTransMap[node.id]?.name ?? node.name`. Fix: locate the equipment-manager page tree row component (likely in /app/frontend/src/pages/EquipmentManager.jsx or components/EquipmentManager*) and apply the same nodeTransMap lookup. Also extend the same map to EquipmentDetailsDialog title/description (already done per handoff note; cannot confirm without UI reach). Console forwardRef warning RCA already documented in iteration_34.
